name: editor-llm
description: EditorLLM — AI-augmented book editing workspace for Google Docs

scripts.build: tsc && cp appsscript.json dist/ && cp *.html dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:all && clasp deploy --deploymentId YOUR_DEPLOYMENT_ID_HERE
